normal_web_search.reason: Prepared as a normal search-engine mode, but live search remains gated until governed provider and internet readiness are verified.

runtime_system_search.reason: Searches local runtime truth, proof, route, AutoDesign, Design Portal, validation, internet readiness, and update governance outputs.
